calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Dismissal - No Appearance

Defendants Hvyw8, Inc. And Mikel Brumfield'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Appearance At Deposition And Request For Sanctions [Per Ex Parte Order Filed 2/14/2022]
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PARABHJEET K. DHANDA, Esq. of Hirsig & Gray LLP (Tel: 707-427-3998) for defendants HVYW8, Inc. and Mikel Brumfield;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Defendants Hvyw8, Inc. And Mikel Brumfield'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Appearance At Deposition And Request For Sanctions [Per Ex Parte Order Filed 2/14/2022].

Defendants stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendants (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT HVYW8, INC.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO SIT FOR HIS DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WILL APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION ON A DATE AT LEAST ONE WEEK IN ADVANCE OF THE PRESENT TRIAL DATE OF 3/14/22. DEFENDANT TO GIVE NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF OF THE DATE CHOSEN BY IT FOR THE DEPOSITION. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION WITHIN THE TIME SPECIFIED, DEFENDANT MAY MOVE FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF THE LITIGATION.

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER, SUBMIT IT TO PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND SEND A COPY TO THE COURT BY EMAIL TO rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
